mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gp_board(bno, groupName, category, location, offlineLocation, region, capacity, currentParticipants, startDate, details, author, isStarted) VALUES (gp_board_seq.nextval, #{groupName}, #{category}, #{location}, #{offlineLocation}, #{region}, #{capacity}, #{currentParticipants}, #{startDate}, #{details}, #{author}, #{isStarted})
mapper.select: SELECT ROWNUM, bno, groupName, currentParticipants, location, capacity, author, startDate, region FROM (SELECT /*+INDEX_DESC(gp_board pk_gp_board)*/ ROWNUM AS RN, bno, groupName, currentParticipants, location, capacity, author, startDate, region FROM gp_board WHERE ROWNUM <= #{maxRow}) WHERE RN > #{minRow}
